code: import React,{createContext,useContext,useState,useEffect}from'react';import{login as apiLogin,getMe,logout as apiLogout}from'../services/api';import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";const AuthContext=/*#__PURE__*/createContext(null);export function AuthProvider(_ref){let{children}=_ref;const[admin,setAdmin]=useState(null);const[loading,setLoading]=useState(true);useEffect(()=>{const token=localStorage.getItem('phenex_token');if(token){getMe().then(setAdmin).catch(()=>localStorage.removeItem('phenex_token')).finally(()=>setLoading(false));}else{setLoading(false);}},[]);const login=async(email,password)=>{const data=await apiLogin(email,password);localStorage.setItem('phenex_token',data.token);setAdmin(data.admin);return data;};const logout=()=>{localStorage.removeItem('phenex_token');setAdmin(null);if(typeof apiLogout==='function')apiLogout();};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsx(AuthContext.Provider,{value:{admin,loading,login,logout},children:children});}export const useAuth=()=>useContext(AuthContext);
